summary: Frontend-only UX upgrade audit (4 batches A-D). Verified hero value-prop block, SocialProofBar, dial help tooltip, bulk wildcard streamer card, Vitoset track-record strip, sticky Telegram CTA, and friendlier empty states across FI and EN at desktop 1440x900 and mobile 375x812. All 13 listed acceptance criteria pass. 0 console errors.

design_issues.screen: StreamerAlertModal opened from bulk-alert wildcard card
issues: Modal title injects the full bulk-card description verbatim into the existing template, producing slightly awkward grammar: 'Ilmoita kun Hälytä mistä tahansa suomalaisesta striimaajasta menee livenä' / 'Notify when Alert me on any Finnish streamer going live goes live'. Not a blocker — the modal opens, target=wildcard, capture form works — but recommend a dedicated 'wildcard' title string in the modal copy when platform=wildcard.

test_evidence.hero_value_prop_fi: Suomenkielisten striimaajien, vedonlyönnin ja sääntelyn live-signaalit — ennen kuin muut huomaavat.
test_evidence.hero_value_prop_en: Live signals on Finnish streamers, betting and regulation — before anyone else notices.
test_evidence.dial_help_popover_fi_text: Mittari = suomalaisen uhkapeli-, striimi- ja urheiluskenen live-lämpötila. Päivittyy 60 s sykleissä.
test_evidence.streamer_bulk_alert_card_fi: HÄLYTÄ KAIKISTA — Hälytä mistä tahansa suomalaisesta striimaajasta — ASETA YLEISHÄLYTYS
test_evidence.streamer_bulk_alert_card_en: ALERT FOR ALL — Alert me on any Finnish streamer going live — SET WILDCARD ALERT
test_evidence.vitoset_track_record_fi: TRACK RECORD · VIIM. 7 PV / Tulokset alkavat tästä viikosta — seuraa Telegramissa.
test_evidence.vitoset_track_record_en: TRACK RECORD · LAST 7 DAYS / Results begin this week — follow on Telegram.
test_evidence.empty_state_ctas_observed_in_dom: streamer-live-empty-cta and paivan-vitoset-empty-cta exist in source; not rendered at test time because grids had live data (12 streamers, 5 picks). Code path verified in StreamerLiveGrid.jsx line 309 and PaivaVitoset.jsx line 259.

action_items: Optional polish: when StreamerAlertModal is opened from the wildcard bulk card, swap the title from the platform/streamer-name template to a dedicated 'wildcard' copy so the sentence reads naturally in FI and EN (currently slightly awkward but functional).
critical_code_review_comments: SocialProofBar fetches 4 endpoints in parallel and handles null gracefully (renders 0). Good.
StickyTelegramCTA TTL logic is sound (7d, localStorage); falls back silently if storage blocked.
DialHelp popover dismissal verified to fully unmount (not just hide).
Carrying forward iteration-16 medium: DialCockpit '... sitten' relative-time ticker still hardcoded FI (not in this iteration's scope but unresolved).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UX upgrade testids ship and work in FI+EN at desktop and mobile. Open follow-ups for main agent: (1) wildcard-modal title copy polish, (2) carry-over from iter 16 — DialCockpit 'LAST UPDATE · Xs sitten' still hardcoded FI. Empty-state CTAs could not be visually exercised because the live data isn't empty; they exist in source and are wired to keys 'empty.no_streamers_*' / 'empty.no_picks_*' in translations.js.
